name: HR managers in restaurants with 10-50 employees tool
description: For HR managers in restaurants processing 10-50 employees, inefficient scheduling causes staff shortages. We automate scheduling instead of using spreadsheets and manual tracking.
target_audience: HR managers in restaurants with 10-50 employees
problem_solved: Inefficient manual scheduling and time-off request processes
